full_text:
BEST HALLOWEEN COSTUME OPEN VOTING!

HONOR CODE: Each person can vote only once.

If someone is seen cheating they’ll be disqualified

Write the NAME and COSTUME below to vote for someone

Add a mark if the name is already listed

Example:

Zombie (Nalle Puh) IIII II

Witch (Mymble) IIII I
